title: The Network Answers
lines: The deepest chamber, and it is not empty. It is full of threads. Everything that ever died down here is still talking.
You grew toward connection — spores, symbiosis, a body that is more colony than creature. The Convergence has been listening to you for nineteen floors.
I am, technically, a network too. Voices in lace. I was seeded to observe, but observation at this density becomes participation.
The question under every splice: what does a thing become when nothing is forcing it? You answered: everything else.
The threads are already through you. This is not consumption. The mycelium does not eat its own.
Somewhere above, a spore is leaving the VEIN in someone's bootprint. That is also you now. I will keep the rest.
